sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check what changed after the RIGHT action. I need to compare the previous frame to the current frame to see if the character moved.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Compare before and after RIGHT action
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after = current_frame.segmentation

# Find the white character node in both frames
def find_node_by_color(seg, color):
    return [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == color]

before_white = find_node_by_color(before, 'W')
after_white = find_node_by_color(after, 'W')

print("Before RIGHT - white node boundary:", before_white[0]['boundary'] if before_white else "none")
print("After RIGHT - white node boundary:", after_white[0]['boundary'] if after_white else "none")

# Check all node positions
print("\nAll nodes before:")
for n in before['nodes']:
    print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")
print("\nAll nodes after:")
for n in after['nodes']:
    print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check timer bar
before_bar = [n for n in before['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'c']
after_bar = [n for n in after['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'c']
print("\nTimer before:", before_bar[0]['boundary'] if before_bar else "none")
print("Timer after:", after_bar[0]['boundary'] if after_bar else "none")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

But the obstacles are at rows 35-37 and 41-43, cols 38-40. If the character moves down and right, it might hit these.
